UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NORTHPOINT APARTMENTS, A PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WELLER, CRAIG THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2390 POWELL STREET, #207 S.F. CA, LEASE FORFEITED
